context: Tests whether the ios-simulator skill uses current simctl route commands and safe Simulator automation patterns.

checklist.name: Custom route command
checklist.description: Uses `xcrun simctl location <device> start` for command-line custom waypoint routes rather than only repeated fixed-location updates or predefined scenarios.

checklist.name: Scenario and GPX boundary
checklist.description: Explains that `simctl location run` accepts predefined scenario names and is not the command for GPX route files.

checklist.name: Install workflow
checklist.description: Boots or waits for the simulator before install/launch and installs a simulator-built `.app` bundle rather than an `.ipa`.

checklist.name: Device selection
checklist.description: Uses an explicit UDID lookup or controlled `booted` usage instead of hardcoding a simulator UDID.

checklist.name: Cleanup
checklist.description: Clears simulated location and shuts down or deletes owned test simulators during teardown.
